title: Durability-immune Soul Speed
description: Removes the durability loss when using the Soul Speed enchantment on Boots on Soul Sand and Soul Soil
body:
# Durability-immune Soul Speed (datapack)


*Run to your soul's desire without worry of breaking your boots!*


This datapack very simply **removes the durability loss inflicted on equipped Boots** when using the [Soul Speed](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Soul_Speed) [enchantment](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Boots#Enchantments) and running on [Soul Sand](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Soul_Sand) or [Soul Soil](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Soul_Soil).


That's the entire purpose of this datapack. No other changes have been made.
